key.name: position
key.description: Position of the calendar indicator on the GNOME panel: 0 = Far Left, 1 = Left, 2 = Center, 3 = Right, 4 = Far Right

key.name: date-format
key.description: Format string for displaying Ethiopian date. Supported tokens: {day}, {month}, {year}

key.name: show-day
key.description: If true, display the day of the week in Amharic before the Ethiopian date on the panel.
